from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.1 — User endpoint devices
from_text: Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices shall be protected.
to_text: Requirements for ensuring information system safety in banking: classification and protection of information assets.
notes: ISO 27001 endpoint protection maps to Circular 09's IT safety requirements for banks.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.5.15 — Access control
from_text: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets shall be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.
to_text: Access control requirements for information systems at credit institutions.
notes: ISO access control directly maps to Circular 09's access control chapter.

from_doc: PCI DSS v4.0 Req 3.5 — Primary account number protection
from_text: Primary account number (PAN) is secured wherever it is stored.
to_text: Security requirements for online banking transactions including protection of card data and authentication credentials.
notes: PCI DSS PAN protection maps to Circular 50's online banking security provisions.

from_doc: PCI DSS v4.0 Req 8.3 — Strong authentication
from_text: Strong authentication for users and administrators is established and managed.
to_text: Multi-factor authentication requirements for online banking services at credit institutions.
notes: PCI DSS strong authentication aligns with Circular 50's MFA requirements.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.24 — Use of cryptography
from_text: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, shall be defined and implemented.
to_text: Encryption requirements for data transmitted in online banking transactions.
notes: ISO cryptography control maps to Circular 50's encryption mandates for banking data.

from_doc: COBIT 2019 DSS05.02 — Manage network and connectivity security
from_text: Use security mechanisms and management procedures to protect information over all connectivity methods.
to_text: Network security requirements for banking information systems including segmentation and monitoring.
notes: COBIT network security maps to Circular 09's network protection requirements.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.5.24 — Information security incident management planning
from_text: The organisation shall plan and prepare for managing information security incidents by defining, establishing and communicating incident management processes, roles and responsibilities.
to_text: Incident response planning and reporting obligations for banking information system security events.
notes: ISO incident management maps to Circular 09's incident response requirements.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.8 — Management of technical vulnerabilities
from_text: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use shall be obtained, the organisation's exposure to such vulnerabilities shall be evaluated and appropriate measures shall be taken.
to_text: Vulnerability assessment and penetration testing requirements for banking information systems.
notes: ISO vulnerability management maps to Circular 09's security testing provisions.

from_doc: COBIT 2019 APO12.01 — Collect data
from_text: Identify and collect relevant data to enable effective IT-related risk identification, analysis and reporting.
to_text: Risk assessment and classification of information systems by security level in banking operations.
notes: COBIT IT risk data collection maps to Circular 09's system classification by risk.

from_doc: PCI DSS v4.0 Req 10.2 — Audit logs
from_text: Audit logs are implemented to support the detection of anomalies and suspicious activity.
to_text: Logging and monitoring requirements for detecting and investigating security events in banking systems.
notes: PCI DSS audit logging maps to Circular 09's logging and monitoring obligations.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.25 — Secure development life cycle
from_text: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be established and applied.
to_text: Secure software development and testing requirements before deployment in banking environments.
notes: ISO SDLC security maps to Circular 09's development and testing provisions.

from_doc: COBIT 2019 DSS01.03 — Monitor IT infrastructure
from_text: Monitor the IT infrastructure and related events, storing sufficient chronological information in operations logs to enable reconstruction, review and examination of time sequences of operations and activities.
to_text: Continuous monitoring and operations logging for banking IT infrastructure.
notes: COBIT infrastructure monitoring maps to Circular 09's operational monitoring.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.5.31 — Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
from_text: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements relevant to information security and the organisation's approach to meet these requirements shall be identified, documented and kept up to date.
to_text: Law on Credit Institutions establishing regulatory framework and compliance obligations for banking operations in Vietnam.
notes: ISO compliance requirements control maps to Vietnam's foundational banking law.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.5.34 — Privacy and protection of personal identifiable information
from_text: The organisation shall identify and meet the requirements regarding the preservation of privacy and protection of PII as applicable according to relevant laws and regulations.
to_text: Law on Personal Data Protection establishing principles and obligations for personal data processing.
notes: ISO PII protection maps to Vietnam's Personal Data Protection Law.

from_doc: PCI DSS v4.0 Req 12.10 — Incident response
from_text: An incident response plan exists and is ready to be activated in the event of a suspected or confirmed security incident.
to_text: Security incident response plan and escalation procedures for banking information systems.
notes: PCI DSS incident response plan maps to Circular 09's incident management chapter.

from_doc: COBIT 2019 DSS05.05 — Manage physical access to IT assets
from_text: Define and implement procedures to grant, limit and revoke access to premises, buildings and areas according to business needs, including emergencies.
to_text: Physical security requirements for data centers and information processing facilities at credit institutions.
notes: COBIT physical access control maps to Circular 09's physical security requirements.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.8.13 — Information backup
from_text: Backup copies of information, software and systems shall be maintained and regularly tested in accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup.
to_text: Backup and disaster recovery requirements for banking information systems and data.
notes: ISO backup control maps to Circular 09's backup and DR provisions.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.5.23 — Information security for use of cloud services
from_text: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services shall be established in accordance with the organisation's information security requirements.
to_text: Requirements for outsourcing and cloud service usage in banking IT operations including risk management.
notes: ISO cloud security maps to Circular 09's IT outsourcing and cloud provisions.

from_doc: PCI DSS v4.0 Req 6.2 — Bespoke and custom software security
from_text: Bespoke and custom software is developed securely.
to_text: Secure development and code review requirements for custom banking application software.
notes: PCI DSS custom software security maps to Circular 09's development security.

from_doc: COBIT 2019 APO13.01 — Establish and maintain an ISMS
from_text: Establish and maintain an information security management system that provides a standard, formal and continuous approach to security management for information.
to_text: Requirement for credit institutions to establish and maintain an information security management framework.
notes: COBIT ISMS requirement maps to Circular 09's overall security management framework.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.7.4 — Physical security monitoring
from_text: Premises shall be continuously monitored for unauthorised physical access.
to_text: Law on Personal Data Protection: principles for processing personal data including consent and purpose limitation.
notes: Physical security monitoring has no relation to data protection consent principles.

from_doc: PCI DSS v4.0 Req 9.4 — Media with cardholder data protection
from_text: Media with cardholder data is securely stored, accessed, distributed and destroyed.
to_text: Regulations on opening and using payment accounts via electronic identification (eKYC).
notes: PCI media handling is unrelated to eKYC account opening procedures.

from_doc: COBIT 2019 EDM02.01 — Evaluate value optimisation
from_text: Continuously evaluate the portfolio of IT-enabled investments, services and assets to determine the likelihood of achieving enterprise objectives at reasonable cost.
to_text: Information system security classification by level for credit institutions.
notes: IT value optimisation governance has no connection to security classification levels.

from_doc: ISO 27001:2022 A.6.7 — Remote working
from_text: Security measures shall be implemented when personnel are working remotely to protect information accessed, processed or stored outside the organisation's premises.
to_text: Standards for Open API connectivity in the banking industry.
notes: Remote working security controls are unrelated to Open API technical standards.

from_doc: PCI DSS v4.0 Req 2.2 — System component configuration standards
from_text: System components are configured and managed securely.
to_text: Conditions for organisations to provide payment intermediary services.
notes: System hardening standards are unrelated to payment intermediary licensing conditions.
